_meta.name: ALM 14B r11 LoRA — fresh-from-base over-fit recovery (2026-04-16)
_meta.rationale: ALM r10 over-fit (final_loss 7.82 vs base ~2.0). Root cause: 300-record template corpus + LoRA-on-LoRA stack (r9 adapter base). r11 starts FRESH from Qwen2.5-14B base — no prior adapter stack — with 80% Korean dialogue + reasoning corpus and aggressive lr/rank reductions. Per feedback_no_resume_data_change: data and params change → step 0 with fresh ckpt dir. NEVER --resume.

supersedes.training/deploy/alm_r11_plan.json: Earlier r11 plan listed base_lora=/runpod/ckpt_r9 (LoRA stack). User correction 2026-04-16: r11 must start fresh-from-base per feedback_no_resume_data_change. lr lowered 5e-7→5e-7 (kept), lora_r 8 (kept), corpus revised to 80% Korean blend rebuilding email/doc/research from scratch.

no_resume_rationale: Per feedback_no_resume_data_change: r11 changes data (synthetic 300-record → 80% Korean blend) AND params (lora_r 16→8, lora_alpha 32→16, base_lora_stack→none) → fresh start mandatory. Prior r10 weights are POISONED (template-memorized, see alm_r10_regression_diagnosis.json). Step 0 from base Qwen2.5-14B, fresh ckpt directory.

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
base.adapter_source_rationale: EXPLICITLY null — no prior adapter (no r9, no r10). r11 trains a brand-new LoRA adapter directly on the unmodified Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct base. r10 over-fit was directly attributable to LoRA-on-LoRA stacking compounding drift (alm_r10_regression_diagnosis.hypothesis_tertiary).

lora.rationale: lora_r=8 / alpha=16 — half of r10 (r=16/alpha=32). Smaller rank + dropout 0.05 jointly constrain adapter capacity to prevent template memorization. 4-module attn-only target keeps trainable params ~7.9M (vs r9 ~15.7M with q/k/v/o×8 layers, vs r10 was wider). Industry-default for instruct fine-tuning.

training.lr_rationale: 5e-7 — 4× lower than r10's 2e-6. r10 EMA stayed at 7.84 throughout (mild divergence). 5e-7 with no LoRA stack should yield monotone descent.

korean_sources: anima-agent/training/corpora/korean_dialogue.txt (preferred — if absent, build from public KO datasets)
NSMC + Korean dialogue from huggingface (filtered, dedup)
corpus.hire_sim_subset: hire_sim_100.hexa first 20 tasks ONLY — prevents the r10 over-rep failure mode (300-record template memorization).
preprocessing: Drop boilerplate templates (any line appearing >3 times)
Per-domain rebuild: email/doc/research curated FROM SCRATCH (do NOT reuse hire_sim_synthetic_r10_*.jsonl)
Preserve code/schedule patterns from r9 corpus (those domains did not regress in r10)
corpus.path_rationale: Distinct from corpus_large.txt (r4-r9) and hire_sim_r10_corpus.txt (r10 poison). Fresh corpus file forces operator to verify path exists before launch.

expected_metrics.korean_quality_check: ≥ 25/30 prompts stay in Korean (vs ALM r10 5/30 language switching observed in Likert eval)

abort_criteria: loss > 5.0 at step 100 → warn (lr near upper limit)
loss > 6.0 at step 200 → kill (lr too high)
loss decreasing but eval_loss diverging → kill (overfitting recurrence)
hire_sim < 0.7 at step 300 mid-eval → kill (regression starting)
Korean stays-in-language ratio < 0.7 at step 300 → kill (language drift)
post_training_eval: hire_sim lenient (30 stratified, Z-path judge) — must hit ≥ 0.85
language consistency: 30 Korean prompts → no KO→ZH/JA switches
smoke test: 20 free-form Korean prompts, qualitative check

wall.rationale: 500 steps × batch 4 × seq 1024 × bf16 × H100 → ~4h. Cheap retry budget enables r12 if r11 misses targets.

trainer.fallback: If Day-2 ABI absent → trainer reports BLOCKED_FFI cleanly (per train_alm_lora.hexa header). Do not silently downgrade.

pod.blocked_by: Free H100 GPU (currently itfl66q4z768kh-serve + 0ws0tlmo9e04v7-clm-r4 in use). Per H100-2-pod policy, must wait for clm-r4 to finish (~41h ETA from 2026-04-16) OR get user approval for 3rd pod.

blocks.forbidden_resume_rationale: r9 and r10 adapters MUST NOT be loaded as base. r11 is fresh-from-base only (feedback_no_resume_data_change).

ready_for_launch_rationale: Config landed. Launch is GATED on: (1) free H100 pod, (2) hxqwen14b Day-2 LoRA FFI entries (forward_with_lora / backward_lora_only / apply_lora_delta), (3) corpus file at /workspace/anima/training/corpus_alm_r11.jsonl assembled by operator.
